desc: Transfers all items in selected categories from a source .rvt to the current project.
summary: Transfers all items in selected categories from a source .rvt to the current project. Opens source detached via TransferStandardsSourceDocumentManager. Executes via TransferStandardsExecutor.
usecase: User wants to apply firm template standards to a new project.
precondition: Active Revit document must be open. Source file must exist.
postcondition: Selected standard categories transferred from source to target.
